description: You are working in gvSIG Desktop with the Natural Earth countries layer ('ne_110m_admin_0_countries') already loaded. Create a choropleth map showing world population using the 'POP_EST' field. Configure the symbology using the 'Equal Intervals' classification method with exactly 5 classes. Save the project to /home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/population_choropleth.gvsproj.
